name: view-only-wallet
description: Chrome extension: AIP-62 view-only Aptos wallet that prints transaction payloads instead of signing them.

scripts.test:all: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.package: pnpm build && cd dist && zip -qr ../view-only-wallet.zip . && cd - >/dev/null && echo 'Wrote view-only-wallet.zip (unzip → Load unpacked)'
